series_metadata.series_description: This retention schedule consists of education course rosters and related documents for continuing education courses.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Paper records may be imaged and indexed to the computer in a machine readable format. Upon confirmation that the paper copy was imaged and indexed properly, then the paper copy may be destroyed. ; Electronic: Any images on the computer are to be retained six years from the date of receipt by the Division and then images on the computer are to be destroyed. ; Microform: Any images in microform are to be retained six years from the date of receipt by the Division and then images on the computer are to be destroyed., Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Erase ; Microform: Recycle
